description: List issues in a GitHub repository. Note: GitHub's REST API considers every pull request an issue, but not every issue is a pull request.

owner.description: The account owner of the repository. The name is not case sensitive.

repo.description: The name of the repository without the .git extension.

milestone.description: If an integer is passed, it should refer to a milestone by its number field. If the string * is passed, issues with any milestone are accepted. If the string none is passed, issues without milestones are returned.

state.description: Indicates the state of the issues to return.

assignee.description: Can be the name of a user. Pass in none for issues with no assigned user, and * for issues assigned to any user.

creator.description: The user that created the issue.

mentioned.description: A user that's mentioned in the issue.

labels.description: A list of comma separated label names. Example: bug,ui,@high

direction.description: The direction to sort the results by.

since.description: Only show results that were last updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ.

per_page.description: The number of results per page (max 100).

page.description: The page number of the results to fetch.
